description:
Completion criteria based on a load step.

Any specified field that evaluates to false will cause this criteria to evaluate to false.

monitoring.benchmarker.configurations.loads.StepCompletionCriteria, as defined in monitoring/benchmarker/configurations/loads.py

$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

average_duration_more_than.description: Evaluates true when the average duration of operations completed during the step exceeds the specified value.

completed_at_least.description: Evaluates true when at least this many operations have completed while the step was collecting valid throughput data.

sampling_duration_at_least.description: Evaluates true when the step has been collecting valid throughput data for at least this long.

throughput_stability_took_longer_than.description: Evaluates true when reaching throughput stability took longer than this amount of time since the start of the step.
